h67ad3df1gf577g4f41g807cgdf3101453b05: *The creature reaches into your mind, its thoughts rattling against yours. Something inside you squirms in recognition.*
h52b74442g26ceg4b8ag8d9egb593dcf9226b: Friend. We will go to the helm now.
he929cb19g1b21g4eb3g83dcg276b72ee5668: We are going to the helm! My friend wants us to go to the helm!
h77b4b685gb280g4678g9c1eg6d6426145dbe: I want you to stay behind.
hd46a7234g55d8g407eg89d4gfb7207aacd23: No - I'm going alone. You stay here.
h81d1c64ega94dg42e5gbed1g035a3c5cb554: Why was I forced onto this ship?
h3416c462gf06bg42c4g9d03g9cb23b5cddb0: To know you. To love you. To give you our gift.
h93dc0243g2b5ag42ccga31dg1e5894bba4d9: Something was put in my eye. What was it?
h548b687bge412g423cg8072g374d54b3d00a: A gift. A gift to make you as we are. Soon you will be so beautiful. So powerful.
h9fc5ea2cgbb78g4be5gbf24g5adbf0191962: Can you tell me where we are?
h6d2c99c1ge03fg4bf0g8208gba673e28e55c: In a realm, where we have fled. We have fled to a realm called Avernus. First of the Nine Hells. We are escaping a great evil.
hc52e8b7ega982g4f87ga918gb7cf6bc9f27b: We are going to the helm. My friend and I are going to the helm.
h8a18c920g1497g452dga911gdcea168d99af: Friend. We are going to the helm.
